title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Atos India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Atos India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Atos India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Atos India:
Atos India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India!
